codeReview.summary: Ran bun scripts/validate-agents.ts (passed) and bun scripts/sync-agents.ts to regenerate README.md and package.json. The diff shows: (1) README agent count incremented from 41 to 42, (2) 'Devin for Terminal' row added to the agent table in correct alphabetical position between Deep Agents and Droid with correct paths (.devin/skills/ and ~/.config/devin/skills/), (3) '.devin/skills/' added to discovery paths list in correct position, (4) 'devin' keyword added to package.json keywords array in correct alphabetical position. The table formatting changed from padded to compact format - this is expected since the sync script regenerates the entire table. No code changes were made to source files, only documentation outputs from the sync script. All verification evidence checks out: grep confirms Devin for Terminal in README, .devin/skills in discovery paths, and devin keyword in package.json.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The sync-agents.ts script regenerates the README agent table with compact formatting (no column padding), which changes the visual diff even for unmodified agents. This is expected behavior, not a bug.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Diff of 59eeef3 shows all table rows reformatted from padded to compact format alongside the Devin addition

summary: Documentation sync executed correctly. README.md and package.json updated via sync-agents.ts script output. Devin for Terminal appears in agent table, discovery paths, and keywords. Agent count incremented. Fulfills VAL-INT-006 and VAL-INT-007.
